initiatives.name: Vancouver Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: We are a libertarian socialist mutual aid group & network based in occupied Vancouver Wa. We are pro-indigenous liberation & sovereignty, pro-black liberation, pro-2SLGBTQIA+.

initiatives.name: Vancouver Free Fridge Project
initiatives.description: The Vancouver Free Fridge Project is a volunteer-run mutual aid network run BY the community FOR the community in Vancouver, Washington.

initiatives.name: Vancouver Forest Keepers
initiatives.description: Getting our hands dirty, boosting self efficacy, and taking direct climate ACTION!

initiatives.name: Synergy Society of SW WA
initiatives.description: Connecting, supporting, and uplifting local community-led mutual aid groups and community initiatives in the Southwest WA area.
